title: trisetum alpinum
intro: Trisetum alpinum, also known as Alpine Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum alpinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trisetum alpinum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
